# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| Latest on `master` | Yes |
| Older releases | No |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

### Preferred: GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting

1. Go to the [Security Advisories](https://github.com/accabog/MedianFilter/security/advisories) page
2. Click **"Report a vulnerability"**
3. Fill in the details and submit

### Alternative: Email

Send an email to **accabog@gmail.com** with:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Affected versions or configurations
- Any potential impact assessment

## What to Expect

- **Acknowledgment** within 48 hours
- A fix or mitigation plan within a reasonable timeframe, depending on severity
- Credit in the release notes (unless you prefer to remain anonymous)

## Scope

This policy covers security-relevant issues in the MedianFilter library, including:
- Memory safety issues (buffer overflows, out-of-bounds access)
- Undefined behavior
- Integer overflow leading to incorrect results

General bugs that do not have security implications should be reported via [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/accabog/MedianFilter/issues).
